templatePreset.title: Use-Case Template
templatePreset.description: Select a pre-configured template to automatically fill companies (overrides manual input).
enumTitles: Marketing Agency Dissatisfaction (SEO agency, marketing agency)

companies.title: Companies to Monitor
companies.description: List of company or product names to search for across all enabled sources. Example: Notion, Stripe, Airbnb.

competitorWatch.title: Competitor Watch (Monitor Mode)
competitorWatch.description: Enter specific competitors you want to track for risk spikes over time.

monitoringMode.title: Monitoring Mode
monitoringMode.description: Run continuously? OFF = one-time scrape. DAILY/WEEKLY = tracks deltas across runs, prevents duplicate leads, generates smart alerts.

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API Key (Required for LLM Evaluation)
openaiApiKey.description: API Key for OpenAI. Used to evaluate signals for genuine buying intent and eliminate false positives.
openaiApiKey.sectionDescription: The LLM evaluator is required to prevent false positives and accurately score intent.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Results per Company
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of results to fetch per company per source. Lower values = faster runs and lower cost. Default: 10.
maxRequestsPerCrawl.sectionDescription: Control speed and cost of each run.

enableReddit.title: Enable Reddit
enableReddit.description: Scrape Reddit posts via Apify actor chaining (uses boneswill/reddit-scraper). Requires UNRESTRICTED Actor permissions on Apify platform. Adds ~$0.01-0.05 per company to run cost.
enableReddit.sectionDescription: Choose which sources to scan. GitHub and Hacker News are free and reliable — recommended for first runs.

enableGithub.title: Enable GitHub
enableGithub.description: Search GitHub Issues for company mentions via the public API. Free, no API key needed. Rate limit: 60 requests/hour.

enableHackernews.title: Enable Hacker News
enableHackernews.description: Search Hacker News stories and comments via the free Algolia API. No API key needed, no rate limit.

enableNews.title: Enable News API
enableNews.description: Search news articles via NewsAPI.org. Requires a free API key (100 requests/day). Get one at https://newsapi.org.

enableG2.title: Enable G2 Reviews
enableG2.description: Scrape highly commercial G2 Reviews via Google Dorking to bypass Cloudflare. (Recommended)

newsApiKey.title: News API Key
newsApiKey.description: Your NewsAPI.org API key. Required only if 'Enable News API' is checked. Free tier: 100 requests/day.
newsApiKey.sectionDescription: Optional API keys for additional data sources.

knownCompetitors.title: Known Competitors
knownCompetitors.description: Optional list of competitor names to detect in discussions. Helps identify switching signals and competitive threats.
knownCompetitors.sectionDescription: Track competitor mentions alongside your target companies.
